topWPAPlays.description: Carson Benge homers (3) on a fly ball to right center field.

Matt Vierling reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Andruw Monasterio. Colt Keith scores. Jahmai Jones scores. Matt Vierling to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Andruw Monasterio.

Riley Greene strikes out swinging.
